registers.label: Cube Register
registers.boundary: The Cube Register is a simplified face projection, not the theorem object.

top.label: Top polarity cap
top.meaning: Upper face carries polarity, orientation, or drive-side emphasis.

bottom.label: Bottom polarity cap
bottom.meaning: Lower face carries return, counter-polarity, or closure-side emphasis.

sides.label: Relationship walls
sides.meaning: Four side faces carry lateral relationship, transport, adjacency, and coupling.

edges.label: Coupling seams
edges.meaning: Edges and corners are seams where polarity caps meet relationship walls.

interior.label: Registered carrier volume
interior.meaning: Interior volume stages loading, compression, focus, release, and trace.

registers.label: Sphere Register
registers.boundary: Continuous boundary register; no privileged walls unless an axis is imposed.

registers.label: Cylinder Register
registers.boundary: Two polarity caps with one continuous relationship wall.

registers.label: Dodeca Register
registers.boundary: Higher-face projection body for later Thalean-adjacent register experiments.
